title: KrakenD Async Agent
description: An Async Agent defines a consumer that subscribes to a queue or event stream (such as RabbitMQ, Kafka, or AWS SNS/SQS) and processes messages independently of HTTP request/response cycles.

name.description: A unique name for the async agent.

encoding.description: The encoding of the consumed messages.

backend.description: Backend definitions to process the consumed messages.

consumer.description: Consumer configuration including topic, subscription, and connection details.

topic.description: The topic or queue name to consume from.

max_rate.description: Maximum rate of messages consumed per second.

connection.description: Connection settings for the message broker.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of connection retry attempts.

health_interval.description: Interval between health checks on the connection.

extra_config.description: Additional component configurations keyed by namespace.
